query:
SELECT 
  DATE(pt.paid_at) AS day,
  SUM(CAST(COALESCE(pt.amount, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS total_amount,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND pt.paid_at >= '2026-04-21'
  AND pt.paid_at < '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY DATE(pt.paid_at)
ORDER BY DATE(pt.paid_at) ASC;

SELECT SUM(CAST(COALESCE(pt.amount, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS grand_total, COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND pt.paid_at >= '2026-04-01'
  AND pt.paid_at < '2026-05-01'
